name: Yuvomi
description: Self-hosted family planner — calendar, tasks, shopping, meals & budget
compose:
name: slashnode-yuvomi
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/ulsklyc/yuvomi:0.77.4
    container_name: yuvomi
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: production
      PORT: '3000'
      DB_PATH: /data/yuvomi.db
      BACKUP_DIR: /backups
      SESSION_SECRET: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      SESSION_SECURE: 'false'
    volumes:
      - web_data-app:/data
      - web_data-backups:/backups
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8180:3000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-app:
    name: slashnode-yuvomi_web_data-app
  web_data-backups:
    name: slashnode-yuvomi_web_data-backups
